label: Transparent pheasant feather motif
prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: transparent motif source for a design-system catalog, later background removal
Primary request: an ornate pheasant feather motif for the Morphous Pheasant design system
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Subject: a single elegant pheasant feather and a small layered fan of secondary pheasant feather barbs, isolated, centered, fully separated from background with crisp edges and generous padding. Feather colors: burnished copper, bottle green iridescence, deep red eye markings, antique gold tips, dark umber shaft. Grassland-edge natural patterning, ornate but usable as a product motif.
Style: high-resolution detailed bitmap illustration with subtle natural feather texture, polished catalog asset, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.
Constraints: do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject; avoid extra birds, flowers, frames, labels, or UI elements.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840 x 2160 full design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input image: the transparent pheasant feather motif is the visual source of truth.
Primary request: create a comprehensive light-mode design-system board titled "Morphous Pheasant" for an ornate content system inspired by pheasant feather patterning at a grassland edge.
Canvas/layout: 16:9 4K-class board, crisp readable labels, dense but organized editorial/product design-system presentation. Use a warm parchment background with ivory panels, copper-gold dividers, fine feather-line texture, and restrained ornate details.
Palette: copper #B7652A, bottle green #1F5F50, pheasant red #A6261D, antique gold #D6A443, umber #3A241B, reed ivory #F7F0DF, ink #201812. Apply these consistently.
Required sections: large motif specimen area, palette swatches with names, typography guidance for English and Japanese, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, sidebar navigation, content dashboard, charts, empty/error/loading states, icon examples, texture/pattern samples, and example article/content layout.
Style: ornate content system, editorial CMS and knowledge-base UI, refined copper green red gold accents, feather-eye details used sparingly, high-end but practical. Text must be legible at gallery preview scale. No fake brand logos beyond the title. No watermark.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840 x 2160 full dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: the pheasant feather motif and the light-mode board are source references.
Primary request: create the matching dark-mode design-system board titled "Morphous Pheasant" for the same ornate content system inspired by pheasant feather patterning at a grassland edge.
Canvas/layout: 16:9 4K-class board, crisp readable labels, same comprehensive system coverage as the light board, translated into dark mode. Use a deep ink/umber background, near-black panels, warm copper borders, antique gold headings, bottle green active states, pheasant red warnings/destructive, and subtle feather-line texture.
Palette: ink #120D0A, dark umber #201812, panel #2B1D15, copper #B7652A, bottle green #1F5F50, pheasant red #A6261D, antique gold #D6A443, reed ivory #F4E8CA. Apply consistently.
Required sections: motif specimen area, palette swatches with names, typography guidance for English and Japanese, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table, command/search, sidebar navigation, content dashboard, charts, empty/error/loading states, icon examples, texture/pattern samples, and example article/content layout.
Style: same ornate content system, refined and practical for editorial CMS and knowledge-base UIs, luminous feather-eye accents used sparingly. Text must be legible at gallery preview scale. No fake brand logos beyond the title. No watermark.
